description: Garage 自带的 HarnessFlow 工程工作流 family pack：23 个 hf-* skills（discovery / experiment / spec / design / tasks / TDD / 各类 review / 各类 gate / hotfix / increment / finalize / doc-freshness）+ 1 个 using-hf-workflow public entry，共 24 个 skill。Per-skill self-contained layout：每个 skill 自带 references/，模板与共享文档分散到各 skill 目录内（无 family-level 共享资产）。Reverse-sync 自 hujianbest/harness-flow upstream v0.1.0 (pre-release, 2026-04-29)：上游正式公开发布；本仓库 garage-side 一处增量 = hf-workflow-router/SKILL.md step 3.5 (F014 Workflow Recall) 与 references/recall-integration.md。
